name: C-2 control mapping: missing controls-file is rejected with exit 2
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework soc2 --control-id CC1.1 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file nonexistent.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'file not found' err.txt && echo missing_file 1>&2
